prompt: A send-money flow: pick one of my saved payees, enter an amount and a note, review the details, then send it from checking.
wire:
export default function SendMoneyFlow() { const [step, setStep] = React.useState<"pick"|"amount"|"review"|"done">("pick"); const [payees, setPayees] = React.useState([]); const [selectedPayee, setSelectedPayee] = React.useState(null); const [amountDollars, setAmountDollars] = React.useState(""); const [memo, setMemo] = React.useState(""); const [accounts, setAccounts] = React.useState([]); const [checkingAccount, setCheckingAccount] = React.useState(null); const [status, setStatus] = React.useState<"idle"|"pending"|"approved"|"error">("idle"); const [errorMsg, setErrorMsg] = React.useState(""); React.useEffect(() => { (async () => { const p = await tools.host_listPayees({}); setPayees(p.data || p.payees || p || []); const a = await tools.host_listAccounts({}); const accs = a.data || a.accounts || a || []; setAccounts(accs); const checking = accs.find((ac: any) => (ac.type || ac.accountType || "").toLowerCase().includes("check") || (ac.name || "").toLowerCase().includes("check") ) || accs[0]; setCheckingAccount(checking); })(); }, []); const amountCents = Math.round(parseFloat(amountDollars || "0") * 100); const amountValid = !isNaN(amountCents) && amountCents > 0; async function handleSend() { setStatus("pending"); setErrorMsg(""); try { const result = await tools.host_transferMoney({ amount: amountCents, recipient_name: selectedPayee?.name || selectedPayee?.payeeName || "", memo: memo, }); if (result && result.status === "pending-approval") { setStatus("pending"); } else { setStatus("approved"); setStep("done"); } } catch (e: any) { setStatus("error"); setErrorMsg(e?.message || "Something went wrong. Please try again."); } } const containerStyle: React.CSSProperties = { maxWidth: 480, margin: "0 auto", padding: "32px 16px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", }; const surfaceStyle: React.CSSProperties = { background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-medium)", padding: "28px 24px", }; const labelStyle: React.CSSProperties = { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: "0.06em", textTransform: "uppercase", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", marginBottom: 8, }; const inputStyle: React.CSSProperties = { width: "100%", boxSizing: "border-box", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", padding: "10px 12px", fontSize: 15, fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", outline: "none", }; const primaryBtn: React.CSSProperties = { width: "100%", padding: "13px 0", background: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", color: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 600, cursor: "pointer", marginTop: 24, }; const ghostBtn: React.CSSProperties = { background: "none", border: "none", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", fontSize: 14, cursor: "pointer", padding: "8px 0", marginTop: 8, width: "100%", textAlign: "center", }; const payeeCardStyle = (selected: boolean): React.CSSProperties => ({ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, padding: "12px 14px", border: selected ? "1.5px solid var(--vendo-color-accent)" : "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", cursor: "pointer", background: selected ? "#F5F5F4" : "var(--vendo-color-surface)", marginBottom: 8, transition: "border 0.15s", }); const avatarStyle: React.CSSProperties = { width: 38, height: 38, borderRadius: "50%", background: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", color: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 15, flexShrink: 0, }; const rowStyle: React.CSSProperties = { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", padding: "10px 0", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", }; const stepIndicator = (

{checkingAccount && (
From {checkingAccount.name || "Checking"} · Balance {fmt.money(checkingAccount.balanceCents || checkingAccount.balance || 0)}
